subcodes.first_line: The Bayan crieth out and saith: O people! Make me not a veil. Verily, He Who revealed it hath commanded you not to take it as proof in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البیان ینادی و یقول یا قوم لا تجعلونی حجابا قد امرکم منزله بان لا تستدلوا به فی ایام
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God is its own standard, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
